lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I was wondering if you could answer a few questions?

lines.speaker: Spirit Angler
lines.text: Sorry, I'm quite busy preparing to face Tempoross. Captain Pudi by the dock can answer any questions you might have.

sections.title: Using items on any of the Spirit Anglers

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Would you care for an egg in this difficult time?

lines.speaker: Spirit Angler
lines.text: Um... no, I don't want your damp egg, thanks...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll take my eggs elsewhere then.
